# Platform Compatibility

Chrome on DesktopChrome on AndroidAndroid AppiOS App
Basic ControlsYesYesYesYes
Floating ControlsNoNoYes
Premium required		No
Online SessionsYesYesYesYes
Toy ConnectivityYes
Some We-Vibe, Satisfyer, and DG-Lab toys have connection issues		Yes
Except for Aneros, PicoBong, Pornhub, Realov, Youou		Yes
Except for Aneros, PicoBong, Pornhub, Realov, Youou		Yes
Except for Aneros, PicoBong, Pornhub, Realov, Youou
System Audio DetectionYes
Windows only		NoYesNo
Local Pattern FilesYesYes
Single file		Yes
Single file		Yes
Single file
Custom ToysYesYes
Websocket only		Yes
Websocket only		Yes
Websocket only
BeaconNoNoYesNo
Beacon DetectorNoNoYesNo
GamepadYes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes
Only while screen is on (will work from lock screen)		Yes
Only while app is visible
Game HapticsYes
Windows only		NoNoNo
GPS LocationYes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		YesYes
GPS SpeedYes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		YesYes
Heart RateYesYesYesYes
KeyboardYes
Key detection when tab is not focused requires Windows		NoNoNo
Motion DetectorYesYesNoNo
Proximity SensorNoNoYesNo
Shake SensorNoYesYesYes
Sound LevelYesYesYesYes
Speech RecognitionYes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes
Only when Chrome tab is visible		Yes

Text to SpeechYesYesYesNo

TwitterYesYesYesYes
